category_sources: Official RTAB-Map homepage at https://introlab.github.io/rtabmap identifies the project and links usage resources.
source_facts.description says Visual and LiDAR SLAM library and standalone application.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub wiki and homepage use the display name RTAB-Map.
source_facts.homepage is the official RTAB-Map project site.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is the project documentation surface with installation, tutorials, tools, and FAQ.
Official wiki installation page documents supported standalone and ROS setups.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/introlab/rtabmap, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
